name: LOFT / Long-Context Frontiers
capability_target: Long-context retrieval, RAG, SQL-like structured query, and many-shot in-context memory up to million-token settings.

input_contract.metadata: paper card plus official data locator when verified
input_contract.query: retrieval, RAG, SQL-like, or many-shot query
input_contract.evidence: support rows and structured state rows
input_contract.memory_system: VCM and non-VCM baselines under equal context budgets

output_contract.answer_accuracy: exact answer, set match, or deterministic local execution for private fixtures
output_contract.latency: local selection and structured fusion cost
output_contract.residuals: retrieval miss, wrong table row, compositional miss, or many-shot rule miss

smoke_steps: locate official payload source and license
run private analogues before public payload scoring
contamination_policy: LOFT public content is calibration-only and not staged until source/license/evaluator are verified. Private analogues may mirror task families only.
regression_policy: If mastered, keep private LOFT-shaped rows as regression and preserve public admission blockers separately.

permission_envelope.memory: private analogues until public source is admitted
permission_envelope.tools: local loaders, scorers, and report writers

teacher_role: No teacher solving. Do not approximate model-judge or multimodal tasks.
